project_context.design_ethos: Command-center focus, mission-linked cards, high legibility in low light, dual-format indicators (icon + number).

morning_7to4.description: High-Vis Safety Yellow for daytime industrial.

layout_and_spacing.system: Tailwind standard scale adapted for NativeWind
layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height (h-12) for all interactive elements to ensure ergonomic mobile usage in an industrial setting.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Use 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800) with no shadows. Flat, tactical minimalism.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black h-12 rounded-sm border border-white font-bold tracking-wide active:bg-zinc-200 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white h-12 rounded-sm border border-zinc-700 font-medium active:bg-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.shift_badge: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase rounded-sm border

cards.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-5 flex flex-col gap-2
cards.stat_card: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1
cards.mission_card: bg-[#141414] border-l-4 border-y border-r border-zinc-800 border-l-current rounded-lg p-4

forms.input: h-12 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white px-4 rounded-sm focus:border-[#FFD600]
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-zinc-400 mb-1

navigation.bottom_tab: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-t border-zinc-800 h-20 pb-safe pt-2
navigation.header: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-b border-zinc-800 h-14 flex flex-row items-center justify-between px-4

image_urls.description: Dark cinematic warehouse interior, dramatic lighting, high contrast. Use as a full-screen background on the login/onboarding screen with a black/60 overlay.
Abstract tactical grid pattern. Use as a repeating background texture in dashboard headers or empty states at 10% opacity.
Portrait of a bearded man in a warehouse. Use for employee list placeholders.
Young bearded man in uniform. Use for employee profiles.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons. Stroke width 2. For critical actions, use dual-format (Icon + Text).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid). Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., testID='login-form-submit-button', testID='shift-card-morning'

instructions_to_main_agent: Write components in .js files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard PropTypes or JSDoc if type validation is needed.
This is a React Native Expo app. Translate Tailwind classes provided in these guidelines to NativeWind or React Native StyleSheet. Use standard RN components (<View>, <Text>, <TouchableOpacity>).
Implement a strict Dark Theme. Do NOT implement a light theme to ensure low-light safety for night workers.
Ensure minimum touch targets of 48x48px across all interactive elements.
For the Schedule View, use a horizontal scrollable week calendar at the top, with mission-linked cards below for the selected day's shifts.
Use the exact shift and leave colors defined in the colors section to maintain operational clarity.
Do NOT use drop shadows. Rely entirely on 1px borders (border-zinc-800) for separation. This creates a flat, technical, tactical UI.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media needs. Do NOT use any placeholder services.
